question_text: Which statement about LED bulbs compared to filament bulbs is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: LED bulbs have lower efficiency because they produce less light

options.label: B
options.text: LED bulbs are more efficient because a greater proportion of electrical energy is converted to light rather than heat

options.label: C
options.text: Filament bulbs are more efficient because they last longer

options.label: D
options.text: Both types have the same efficiency but LED bulbs are cheaper

explanation: LED bulbs convert a much higher percentage of electrical energy into visible light (around 80–90% efficiency), while filament bulbs waste most energy as unwanted heat (only about 5% efficiency). This is why LEDs are considered 'greener' and save money on electricity bills.
